commit_scope: Make the pulse witness probe public API and web origins when production is configured with Docker-local service aliases, and narrow the ideas probe to a small native-route canary.

local_validation.summary: Prompt guide passed after attaching the worktree branch. Wellness completed and named active deploy/public reach instability. Pulse probe tests passed: 32 passed. Full pulse package tests passed: 79 passed. Whitespace check passed. Live public probe after the limited ideas change showed endpoint_ideas breathing at 341ms; concurrent Hostinger deploy activity still produced real public 502/timeout windows that should remain visible.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 10 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, checked_at, strained: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | {name,status,latency_ms,detail,last_sample_at}], silences: (.ongoing_silences|length)}'
deploy_validation.summary: Pre-deploy production pulse still runs the old probe path: endpoint_ideas reports 'fell back: expected native-kernel, got no router header' while direct public /api/ideas?limit=1 returns native-kernel 200 in about 0.4s. Public verification remains pending until this pulse image lands.

phase_gate.reason: CI and deploy validation are pending.

evidence_refs: Live production pulse before change: overall=strained with endpoint_ideas detail 'fell back: expected native-kernel, got no router header' and web slow strain.

Direct public route checks during diagnosis: /api/ideas?limit=1&offset=0&sort=marginal_cc returned 200 with x-form-router native-kernel in about 0.35-0.41s and 2167 bytes; default /api/ideas returned about 371210 bytes and about 1.9-2.24s.
The deployed pulse README/config path uses PULSE_API_BASE=http://api:8000 and PULSE_WEB_BASE=http://web:3000 in Docker, which bypasses the public Traefik/native-router path unless lifted.
Active Hostinger deploy churn caused real public timeouts/502s during diagnosis; those are not hidden by this change.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: When the pulse monitor is configured with Docker service aliases, it probes the public API and web origins, so endpoint_ideas no longer strains merely because the internal API path lacks x-form-router. The ideas canary also reads one idea instead of the full default payload.
test_flows: pulse/tests/test_probe.py::test_docker_local_bases_probe_public_witness_path proves Docker-local configured bases produce public API/web probe URLs.
Live pre-deploy public probe shows limited endpoint_ideas returns breathing with native-kernel carrier.
e2e_validation.pending_reason: Public endpoint verification waits for PR merge and Hostinger deploy.
